query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  createdAt,
  lastSignedIn,
  onboardingStep,
  onboardingCompletedAt,
  currentTool,
  painPoints,
  successDefinition,
  willingnessToPay,
  additionalNotes
FROM users
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
